title: Designer Modeling
description: Shrink Minecraft blocks to 1/16 size for detailed building and decoration.
body:
This mod is for you make some model by scals -16 x -16 x -16.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WK8hLzL-0B0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

How To Install :
- Download forge and Install
- Download this Mod
- copy this mod to %appdata%\.minecraft\mods\
- enjoy :)

How To Use :

Step 1 : Craft Bit Block.

Step 2 : Plance invisible block by Bit Block
Step 3 : Right Click in invisible Block

Rotate block shift and click that slot :
F = Front
L = Left
B = Back
R = Right

Color :
White = Nomaly Rotate
Red = Top Rotate
Blue = Bottom Rotate
